request:
기존 run /Users/zenkim_office/Project/AIZen/.ai/pipeline/runs/20260511-170810_stock-trading-automation-agent 의 주식 자동매매 에이전트 계획을 보완한다. 이번 요청은 플랜 보완이 우선이며, 사용자가 별도로 구현 시작을 승인하기 전까지 실제 코드 구현은 시작하지 않는다.

반영할 사용자 결정과 방향:
- 사용자는 국내용 먼저 개발 후 해외용 추가 vs 해외용 먼저 개발 후 국내용 추가 중 어느 쪽이 나은지 물었다.
- 결론은 '브로커 독립 공통 코어를 먼저 설계하고, 첫 실행 어댑터는 Alpaca paper로 검증한 뒤, 두 번째 어댑터로 한국투자증권 KIS 국내/해외주식을 추가'하는 순서다.
- 토스증권은 개인 자동매매용 공개 Trading API를 확인하지 못했으므로 제외한다.
- 미래에셋은 로보링크/FIX/API DMA 계열은 보이나 개인 개발자용 REST 자동매매 MVP에는 부적합하므로 초기 후보에서 제외한다.
- 국내 실사용 가능성은 KIS adapter로 흡수한다.
- AIZen 구조 제약: TypeScript, skills/zen-<name>/, core/secrets Keychain-only, core/error, core/types를 반드시 사용한다. src/trading, configs/trading, .env.example는 만들지 않는다.
- 플랜은 공통 코어 -> Alpaca paper adapter -> KIS adapter -> live 후보 결정 순서로 재작성한다.
- 리스크 정책은 기존 deep-research-report.md 근거처럼 고정 익절/손절보다 변동성/낙폭 예산 기반으로 둔다.

산출물 요구:
1. 국내-first vs US-first 비교와 최종 결정 근거.
2. 수정된 구현 순서와 acceptance gates.
3. AIZen 파일 구조 계획.
4. 브로커 adapter 인터페이스와 Alpaca/KIS 차이를 흡수하는 설계.
5. 구현 보류 상태와 사용자 승인 필요 조건.

rules: image-backed or screenshot-backed CDS components are not publishable completion
completion requires structuralFidelity.status=pass
ContractException documents quarantine/remediation only and cannot convert structure to PASS

tier_profile.label: Decomposition + Lead Integration
tier_profile.description: Cross-project policy, architecture, risky automation, or broad orchestration work.
tier_profile.worker_shape: evidence worker, primary persona maker, senior integration, and lead release judgment
tier_profile.review_shape: assignment review, per-stage peer gates, and integration review

workers.responsibility: Gather bounded evidence and list affected files without editing.
Implement the assigned slice inside a disjoint write scope.
Integrate worker output, repair defects, and verify behavior.
Check architecture, process fit, and release readiness.

risk_policy.description: Use deterministic scope heuristics without bias.

routing_policy_profile.description: Assign functional persona for judgment first, then assign execution_profile/model/effort by task difficulty, blast radius, integration risk, and review need.
routing_policy_profile.token_optimization: Prefer the lowest execution profile that can safely satisfy the task; reserve senior/lead profiles for integration, repair, architecture, policy, and release judgment.

workers.responsibility: Gather bounded evidence and list affected files without editing.

external_candidates.fit: high-signal discovery index for Claude Code resources
external_candidates.risk: README organization is in flux; use as map, not operational source

external_candidates.fit: portable skill source map across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and others
external_candidates.risk: translation layer must preserve original licenses and creator attribution

open_skill_playbook.activation: Use when the worker owns bounded evidence gathering, source quality, prior-art scanning, or uncertainty reporting.
rules: Prefer primary sources and local repo evidence.
Separate verified fact, inference, and unresolved uncertainty.
Keep discovery bounded to the assigned question and output reusable citations.
do_not: Do not turn discovery into implementation unless explicitly assigned.
Do not cite a collection index as proof for the underlying tool without checking the source.

open_skill_sources.fit: Agent Skill structure and progressive-disclosure source format.

workers.responsibility: Implement the assigned slice inside a disjoint write scope.

external_candidates.fit: orchestration, agent workflow, plugin architecture, progressive-disclosure skills
external_candidates.risk: large plugin surface; adapt selectively, do not install wholesale
index entry only; verify upstream license and source before adaptation

open_skill_playbook.activation: Use when the worker owns agent workflows, commands, context, handoff, memory, or orchestration artifacts.
rules: Design the durable artifact contract before changing runtime behavior.
Separate public triggers from internal routing metadata.
Preserve resume, handoff, and audit trails when adding automation.
Define observability events for handoffs, tool calls, costs, retries, and multi-agent coordination before adding hidden automation.
For design-system automation, represent recovery, quarantine, remediationRequired, and PASS as separate states; exceptions must not silently promote blocked work to completion.
do_not: Do not add public role/model triggers for internal routing metadata.
Do not rely on hidden session state when a file artifact can preserve the decision.
Do not let an exception schema or reviewer note override a hard completion gate without explicit audited evidence.

open_skill_sources.fit: Agent workflow, orchestration, command, and skill architecture patterns.
Agent Skill structure and progressive-disclosure source format.
Agent observability source for tracing, tool-call tracking, token/cost tracking, multi-agent coordination, guardrails, and production evals; kept inactive until public maintenance/activity improves.
